title: Reco Mitigates AI Agent Risk Across Claude and the Enterprise
description: New bidirectional integration provides governance across Claude Enterprise, Claude Platform and the agents operating between them; and enables Claude to query the Reco Graph for security investigations Reco, the company that helps enterprises govern AI agents and protect the applications and workflows they access, announced it has extended the Reco... The post Reco Mitigates AI Agent Risk Across Claude and the Enterprise appeared first on CIO Influence .

title: Forget AI, Britain needs to remember what we're really world leaders in
description: Human creativity must be protected, says How to Train Your Dragon creator Cressida Cowell.

title: Naver Unveils Defense Omnimodal AI for Real-Time Drone, Tactical Vehicle Analysis
description: Naver Cloud unveiled HyperCLOVA X SEED 4B, a lightweight omnimodal AI model for defense, enabling real-time analysis on drones and tactical vehicles in limited computing environments.

title: US order cutting access to Anthropic's AI models sparks criticism
description: The U.S. government's order for Anthropic to withdraw its most powerful artificial intelligence models has sparked a wave of criticism from both advocates and opponents of AI regulation.

title: UK under-16s social media rules to reach into gaming and AI chatbots
description: Britain is expected to set out restrictions on how children under 16 use social media, in a package that could ban access to the main platforms and curb features judged too addictive for young users, according to reporting on the government’s plans. Prime Minister Keir Starmer is said to have decided to go further after speaking [...] This story continues at The Next Web
